changes_made.description: Baseline run with original verbose SKILL.md (6.7KB, theoretical content, no anti-delegation rules)
changes_made.result: knapsack-optimize scored 100/100. facility-placement scored 80/100 — model delegated to a subagent via Task tool, which computed the answer manually instead of writing a Python script. The subagent produced an impossible total_covered_population=325 (max is 196), placed facilities too close together, and failed the population-good criterion.

changes_made.description: Complete SKILL.md rewrite targeting devstral-small weaknesses: (1) Added CRITICAL RULES section telling model to never delegate to subagents/Task tool and always write Python scripts, (2) Provided complete runnable Python templates for 0/1 knapsack DP and facility placement greedy+local search, (3) Emphasized using json.dump() instead of manual JSON construction, (4) Added verification step to read output file back, (5) Removed theoretical content in favor of actionable templates.
changes_made.result: Both tasks scored 100/100. Confirmed with a second run also scoring 100/100.
